action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 9 LightGBM Ranker with lambdarank gave val IC 0.0226 but test IC -0.0056 (negative). Analysis: model overfits to validation, discretization loses signal, and lambdarank may not generalize to future period ranking. Decision: switch to LightGBM Regressor with 'regression' objective, custom daily IC metric for early stopping, add regularization (subsample, colsample, L1/L2), and submit eval to see if continuous prediction improves test IC.
